final_recommendation: Use the local nanoparticle_plasmonics requirement template -> nanoparticle_plasmonics -> nanoparticle plasmonics / scattering preview path, inspect material candidates au, ag, sio2, water, air, then review any calculator preview, workflow plan, and adapter preview via meep with gmsh geometry preview. Observable previews supported by the adapter mapping: scattering_spectrum, extinction_spectrum. Real solver monitor results require explicit solver execution when applicable.
